title: 1.1: Removes all 22 unexported wrapper methods (including click, dblclick, fill, focus, hover, check, uncheck, setChecked, isChecked, isEditable, ...) that only set options and forward to l.frame from the Locator type

1.2: Preserves strict mode enforcement (opts.Strict = true) in all 23 refactored public Locator methods (including Click, Dblclick, Fill, Clear, Check, Uncheck, IsChecked, IsEditable, IsEnabled, IsDisabled, ...)
1.3: Retains retry behavior in all 6 action methods (Click, Dblclick, Hover, Check, Uncheck, SetChecked)

1.4: Calls the corresponding l.frame method directly from all 23 refactored public Locator methods (including Click, Dblclick, Fill, Clear, Check, Uncheck, IsChecked, IsEditable, Focus, GetAttribute, ...) instead of routing through private wrappers
3.1: Removes orphaned doc comments from all 8 deleted private methods with comments (click, dblclick, check, uncheck, isChecked, isEditable, isEnabled, isDisabled) in locator.go
4.1: Drops or alters the fmt.Errorf error-wrapping pattern (such as 'clearing %q: %w' or 'clicking on %q: %w' or 'filling %q with %q: %w') in any of the 23 refactored public Locator methods
4.2: Changes the function signature of any of the 23 exported Locator methods (including Click, Dblclick, Fill, Clear, Check, Uncheck, IsChecked, IsEditable, IsEnabled, IsDisabled, ...)
